summary: End-to-end testing of Lumen Works landing page. All 7 backend pytest cases passed (health, services, languages, contact CRUD + validation). Frontend loaded with no console errors; all sections rendered, smooth-scroll nav links work, hero CTA scrolls to contact, languages marquee renders 8 languages, contact form validation toast works on empty submit, valid submission shows success toast, clears the form, and the entry persists in MongoDB (verified via GET /api/contact).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: `logger` is referenced inside create_contact() but the module-level `logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)` is defined AFTER the route registration. It works because the function runs at request-time, but it's stylistically fragile — move logging.basicConfig and logger definition above the routes.

server.py: list_contacts() converts created_at strings back to datetime in Python after MongoDB returns them, only to serialize them again via Pydantic — store as native BSON datetime instead of isoformat strings to remove this round-trip.

Lenis SmoothScroll click handler uses `link.getAttribute('href')` directly as a CSS selector (e.g. `#contact`). If a future anchor href ever contains characters that aren't valid selectors (e.g. an empty fragment or numeric id), `document.querySelector` will throw. Consider try/catch.
test_credentials: N/A — no auth on this app
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_/UI_TEST_-prefixed contact submissions during testing. Test docs remain in MongoDB contact_submissions collection.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend regression suite lives at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py and covers /api/health, /api/services, /api/languages, and /api/contact (POST 201, GET, 422 validation cases). REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL is read from env. Frontend uses sonner for toasts (selector: [data-sonner-toast]) and Lenis-based smooth scroll. data-testids per the request all resolve correctly.
rca of the issue: No issues — all critical flows pass.
